name: mas-scholar-skills
description: Repo-tracked Codex plugin for MAS Scholar Skills capability modules and medical-paper skill entries.

interface.shortDescription: Codex skill entries for MAS medical-paper capability support.
interface.longDescription: Provides Codex skill entries for MAS Scholar Skills capability modules, medical literature discovery, standard opl scholar-skills CLI readbacks, refs-only materialized candidate packages, and MAS owner-gated authority boundaries.
defaultPrompt: Use MAS Scholar Skills to inspect medical-paper capability modules.
Use medical-research-lit to plan PubMed-backed literature discovery.
Check MAS Scholar Skills authority boundaries before a MAS handoff.
